news.title: Spirit's collapse, high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
news.summary: Memorial Day weekend is the unofficial start of the summer travel season. The holiday weekend will show just how much travelers want to fly and how much they're willing to pay.

news.title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
news.summary: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases. Americans' wallets are stretching as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.

news.title: SpaceX launches Starship test flight on second try
news.summary: SpaceX launched its massive Starship rocket on Friday. The launch comes a day after the company scrubbed plans before takeoff. The rocket is expected to take off on a mission to build a space station.

news.title: Lingering mysteries from Berkshire's portfolio update
news.summary: The addition of two new names, Delta Air Lines and Macy's, to the portfolio are hard to explain. The addition of the new names is hard to understand, but it's a good start.

news.title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
news.summary: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.

news.title: The bond market just flipped the script on investors — Wall Street is acting like nothing’s wrong
news.summary: When credit and stocks disagree, credit is the one telling the truth, says CNN's John Sutter. Sutter: When credit and stock prices disagree, it's the credit that's telling the true story.

news.title: Annuity payouts are the highest they’ve been in years. Thanks, inflation.
news.summary: A silver lining to the cloud of high interest rates. The U.S. Federal Reserve is raising interest rates for the first time in more than a decade.

news.title: These cybersecurity stocks are poised for rapid growth through 2028, and some of them are cheap right now
news.summary: Cybersecurity hardware, software and services are expected to put up tremendous sales numbers as the AI build-out continues. Many providers of cybersecurity hardware,Software and services will see a spike in sales.

news.title: Kevin Warsh’s Fed isn’t cutting interest rates any time soon. But a hike isn’t yet on the table, either.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve isn't going to reduce borrowing costs anytime soon because of resurgent inflation. A rate hike is also off the table for now as the regime of new Chair Kevin Warsh gets underway.

news.title: Stocks tend to sink during the summer before midterm elections. Will history repeat itself?
news.summary: Summer tends to coincide with a weak stock market. During midterm years, summer tends to be a weak time for the stock market in the United States.
